title: German Roast Pastry
description: A sweet German-inspired pastry filled with roasted flavors.

ingredients.name: Malai Milk
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with heavy cream

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a small bowl, mix together the malai milk, unsalted butter, granulated sugar, ground cinnamon, and ground nutmeg.
Place a tablespoon of the malai milk mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the pastries with a little extra malai milk.
Place the pastries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastries are golden brown.
